title: Aether: Regenerated
description: Bringing some originality into The Aether!
body:
#

A Resource pack for Minecraft 1.19.2, 1.20.1, 1.20.2, 1.20.4

#

Aether: Regenerated is a Minecraft Resource Pack that focuses on further updating the textures present in the Aether Mod.
The main goal was to bring more originality to the dimension, without having to resort to using recolors of items/blocks from Vanilla, while also adding my own little spin to it.
Regenerated has support for various addon mods for the Aether, with more coming in the future! Those addons being:

Addon Mod

 1.19.2 1.20.1 1.21.1

Aether: Lost Content

 X ✓ X

The Aether: Redux

 ✓ ✓ X

Aether: Emissivity

 X ✓ ✓

Aether: Treasure Reforging

 ✓ ✓ ✓

Aether: Treasure Reforging

 ✓ ✓ ✓

Aether: Overworld Ores

 X ✓ ✓

Deep Aether

 ✓ ✓ ✓
In addition, the pack has a couple of add-on resource packs built in, just open the zip file and head to the "addons" folder & simply drag the folder to ".minecraft/resourcepacks"
Said add-on packs for Regenerated include:
